panel_style.label: Bar appearance
panel_style.description: Choose how much information Codex Usage shows in the bar.

display_mode.label: Usage values
display_mode.description: Choose which remaining-usage windows are shown.

refresh_interval.label: Refresh interval
refresh_interval.description: How often Codex usage is refreshed, in seconds.

codex_path.label: Codex executable
codex_path.description: Optional path to the Codex executable. Leave blank to use PATH.
